changeSet.author: olesia
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO dbo.payment_method (code, name, description, is_active) VALUES ('CASH', 'Готівка', 'Payment with cash at the terminal', 1), ('CARD', 'Банківська карта', 'Payment via debit or credit bank card', 1), ('DIGITAL_WALLET', 'Цифровий гаманець', 'Payment via Apple Pay, Google Pay, etc.', 1);

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM dbo.payment_method WHERE code IN ('CASH', 'CARD', 'DIGITAL_WALLET');
